_note: Curated aggregate of the faithfulness judge panel (3 lenses per config: completeness / scope_discipline / holistic, each scoring the config's sprint_plan.md against the NIFB source spec as ground truth, 0-10). high/medium/low/hybrid were scored in one panel run; medlow in a follow-up run with the identical lenses/rubric. fr_count is the FR count of that run's spec_analysis==sprint_plan (the tournament is FR-set-preserving). n=1 generation per config — see ../README.md 'Caveats'.
verdict_fr_count_vs_faithfulness: No correlation. medium (~35 FRs in this run) and hybrid (~27) tied at the top with low-FR configs; high (22) and low (34) tied at the bottom. Faithfulness is driven by error TYPE (high over-specifies/invents SLAs+stack; low under-specifies/flattens the conversational UX), not FR count.
universal_blind_spots: Login modernization (Google/Apple SSO, phone-code OTP, biometric/badge sign-in) — missed or deferred-to-non-goal by EVERY config
In-flow donor/company recognition during the signup/check-in conversation (the spec's marquee 'magical moment') — absent or reduced to a post-hoc batch match in EVERY config
recommendation: analyze_spec=medium + tournament=low (config 'medlow'): on the faithfulness frontier (8.0) at lowest cost; tournament is reasoning-insensitive so 'low' there is free. The remaining gap is the analyze_spec PROMPT (the two universal blind spots above), not a reasoning level.
